source: Real Estate Search 2026 Drive folder — tour recordings & consultation summaries, imported 2026-07-12

places.address: The Vines — 4501 Amos Smith Rd, Charlotte, NC 28214
places.notes: Toured Lakeview model with James (3bd/3ba, 1,450 sqft, ground-floor primary). Comparing vs Taggart (1,983 sqft) and Jordan next door. Kitchen felt smaller unfurnished — get room dimensions before deciding. Community: pool, playground, dog park; ~9 mi to Uptown, near airport/destination district. Range $327K–$384K. Audio + consultation summary in Drive (Real Estate Search 2026).

places.address: Sloan Station — 5809 Tuckaseegee Rd, Charlotte, NC 28208
places.notes: Visited 6/27 — discussed purchase and incentives (recording in Drive). Two-story townhomes, 1-car garage, 1,200–1,697 sqft, $267K–$334K. 27-home community; easy access to Uptown, South End, airport, Whitewater Center.

places.address: Redhawk Townes — 1555 Swallow Tail Dr, Belmont, NC 28012
places.notes: Consultation on townhome purchase 6/27 (recording in Drive). $316K–$331K, HOA $295/mo — clubhouse, two pools, bocce/tennis/pickleball. Gaston County (Belmont) — cheaper entry, higher Gaston taxes; check rental restrictions given amenity-heavy HOA.

places.address: Greenway Overlook — 2039 Near Point Rd, Charlotte, NC 28208
places.notes: New-construction townhome tour 6/28 (recording in Drive). Boutique 58-unit community, $332K–$470K, 3bd/3ba, 1,601–2,302 sqft, 1–2 car garages. 10 min to Uptown; near I-77/I-85, airport, Whitewater Center.
